arts.sum: But Lampard made his stance clear on outgoings early on, insisting that even though the likes of Kitching and Thomas-Asante were struggling for game time heading into the mid-term window, he wanted to keep them as he continues to assess his inherited squad. Frank Lampard has revealed that Coventry City received transfer deadline inquiries for “some” of his players but the club remained firm in their stance of wanting to keep all seniors in place.
